_comment: 杯弓蛇影 · 新规则第一条（2026-07-07）：一拍=一句短句，同 sceneId 连续拍共用一张图；文案 100% 用户原文。★故事段（s1~s7）=古代典故重演模式（plan/10 4.10）：refMode=style 只喂风格锚图，人物画古人（束发长袍），不用定妆、不保 IP；文案说 2 人（县令+杜宣）就画 2 人。杯=汉代宽口浅漆耳杯（大酒器），弓影=横贯整杯的长蛇（不是蚯蚓）。道理段回到现代，boy/girl 按需出场（IP 定妆）。全片 10 场景全 flux（$0.40），无 nano。
sourceQuote: 杯弓蛇影：我们大多内耗，是把脑补的幻象当成伤害自己的真相。
_duXuan: 杜宣固定外观（各拍逐字复用防漂移）：a slender middle-aged Chinese man, hair tied up in a small dark topknot bun, short thin dark beard, kind gentle face, FAIR LIGHT skin, wearing a plain DARK-BLUE crossed-collar ankle-length robe with wide sleeves and a dark cloth belt

shots.content: The chubby mom sits comfortably on a floor cushion beside a low wooden table, leaning forward warmly as if about to tell an exciting story, one hand raised in a lively storytelling gesture, gentle inviting smile. On the low table in front of her stands a wide shallow oval ancient Chinese lacquer ear-cup (dark red-brown, two ear-shaped side handles), and across the wine surface stretches ONE LONG slender dark curved snake-like shadow spanning almost the whole cup — the shadow lies FLAT ON the liquid surface INSIDE the cup like a dark reflection, it does NOT rise into the air, NOT smoke, NO snake above or outside the cup. Table and cushion drawn with a few loose light pencil lines, lots of empty white space.
shots.contentZh: 妈妈坐在矮木桌旁的坐垫上，身体微微前倾、抬手做讲故事的手势，笑容温暖有吸引力，像要开讲一个精彩故事。桌上一只宽口浅漆耳杯，酒面横贯一道细长蛇形暗影。桌与坐垫几笔淡线，大量留白。

captions.pinyin: bēi gōng shé yǐng bèi hòu de gù shi
captions.local: Câu chuyện đằng sau 'bóng cung, tưởng rắn',

captions.zh: 学会了讲给身边的朋友听
captions.pinyin: xué huì le jiǎng gěi shēn biān de péng you tīng
captions.local: học xong nhớ kể cho bạn bè cùng nghe nhé

shots.content: An ancient Chinese banquet scene: a slender middle-aged Chinese man, hair tied up in a small dark topknot bun, short thin dark beard, kind gentle face, FAIR LIGHT skin, wearing a plain DARK-BLUE crossed-collar ankle-length robe with wide sleeves and a dark cloth belt, walks politely toward a low wooden banquet table, giving a slight bow with hands cupped together in ancient greeting. On the table a small wine ewer and a wide shallow oval ear-cup, drawn with loose light pencil lines. Minimal ancient banquet scene, lots of empty white space.
shots.contentZh: 古代宴席：束发髻、短须、深蓝交领长袍的中年男子（杜宣）拱手微躬走向矮木案，案上一只小酒壶和一只宽口浅耳杯，几笔淡铅笔线。极简古代宴席，大量留白。

captions.zh: 古时候杜宣赴上司宴席，
captions.pinyin: gǔ shí hou dù xuān fù shàng si yàn xí
captions.local: Ngày xưa, Đỗ Tuyên đến dự tiệc nhà cấp trên,

shots.content: A slender middle-aged Chinese man, hair tied up in a small dark topknot bun, short thin dark beard, FAIR LIGHT skin, wearing a plain DARK-BLUE crossed-collar ankle-length robe with wide sleeves and a dark cloth belt, sits on a floor mat at a low wooden banquet table, holding a wide shallow oval ancient lacquer ear-cup with both hands and lowering his head to look into it, eyes wide with fright, tiny sweat drops by his face. Across the wine inside the cup lies ONE LONG slender dark snake-like reflection stretching across almost the WHOLE cup — the snake shape lies FLAT ON the liquid surface INSIDE the cup like a dark reflection, it does NOT rise into the air, NOT smoke, NO snake above or outside the cup. Table hinted with a few loose light pencil lines, lots of empty white space.
shots.contentZh: 杜宣（同款束发短须深蓝长袍）席地坐在矮案前，双手捧宽口浅耳杯低头看，瞪大眼睛受惊、脸旁小汗珠。杯中酒面横着一道几乎贯穿整杯的细长蛇形倒影。案几笔淡线，大量留白。

captions.pinyin: dī tóu yǐn jiǔ shí
captions.local: Lúc cúi đầu nâng chén rượu,

captions.zh: 赫然看见杯底盘着一条小蛇，
captions.pinyin: hè rán kàn jiàn bēi dǐ pán zhe yī tiáo xiǎo shé
captions.local: ông giật mình thấy một con rắn nhỏ cuộn dưới đáy chén,

captions.pinyin: shùn jiān hún shēn fā máo
captions.local: lập tức sởn hết cả gai ốc.

shots.content: A slender middle-aged Chinese man, hair tied up in a small dark topknot bun, short thin dark beard, FAIR LIGHT skin, wearing a plain DARK-BLUE crossed-collar ankle-length robe with wide sleeves and a dark cloth belt, squeezes his eyes tightly shut, grimacing, and tilts a wide shallow oval ancient lacquer ear-cup with both hands to drink the wine all at once, shoulders stiff, one sweat drop on his forehead. He sits on a floor mat at a low wooden table hinted with a few loose light pencil lines, lots of empty white space.
shots.contentZh: 杜宣（同款束发短须深蓝长袍）紧闭双眼、表情为难，双手端起宽口浅耳杯一饮而尽，肩膀僵硬、额头一滴汗。席地坐矮案前，案几笔淡线，大量留白。

captions.pinyin: kě ài yú shēn fèn bù gǎn shī lǐ
captions.local: Nhưng vì giữ phép với cấp trên, không dám thất lễ,

captions.pinyin: zhǐ néng yìng zhe tóu pí
captions.local: ông đành liều mình,

captions.pinyin: bì zhe yǎn bǎ jiǔ yǐn jìn
captions.local: nhắm mắt uống cạn chén rượu.

shots.content: A slender middle-aged Chinese man, hair tied up in a small dark topknot bun, short thin dark beard, FAIR LIGHT skin, wearing a plain DARK-BLUE crossed-collar robe, lies weakly ON HIS BACK on a simple low ancient wooden bed, a blanket covering him up to the chest, face pale exhausted and SICK, eyes half-closed, mouth slightly turned DOWN, absolutely NOT smiling, one hand resting on his stomach. Above his belly floats a very faint thin pencil sketch of ONE LONG coiled snake, as if imagined. Bed drawn with a few loose light pencil lines, lots of empty white space.
shots.contentZh: 杜宣（同款束发短须深蓝袍）在古式矮木床上盖被虚弱躺着，脸色苍白，一手放腹部；腹部上方漂着一条极淡铅笔画的长蛇（想象出来的）。床几笔淡线，大量留白。

captions.pinyin: guī jiā hòu zǒng jué de
captions.local: Về nhà, ông cứ cảm thấy

captions.pinyin: shé zuān rù wǔ zàng liù fǔ
captions.local: con rắn đang bò trong ruột gan mình,

captions.pinyin: rì jiàn xū ruò
captions.local: người ngày một yếu đi,

captions.pinyin: xún biàn míng yī dōu wú cóng yī zhì
captions.local: tìm khắp danh y cũng không chữa nổi.

shots.content: TWO ancient Chinese men at a low wooden banquet table. Seated: a slender middle-aged Chinese man, hair tied up in a small dark topknot bun, short thin dark beard, FAIR LIGHT skin, wearing a plain DARK-BLUE crossed-collar ankle-length robe with wide sleeves, looking up surprised and relieved. Standing beside him: a slightly stout older Chinese man with a grey topknot bun and short grey beard, wearing a plain BROWN crossed-collar ankle-length robe with wide sleeves, pointing up at a LONG archery bow hanging FLAT AGAINST the wall behind them (just the curved bow, NO arrow, NOT floating in mid-air, attached to the wall). A soft light shadow line runs from the bow down into the wide shallow oval ear-cup on the table — the 'snake' was just the bow's LONG reflection. Wall, bow and table drawn with loose light pencil lines, lots of empty white space.
shots.contentZh: 两位古人：杜宣（同款束发短须深蓝长袍）坐在矮案前惊讶又释然地抬头；旁边站着微胖的老年县令（灰发髻灰短须、棕色交领长袍），手指墙上平挂的长弓。一道浅影线从弓落进案上的宽口浅耳杯——所谓蛇只是弓的长倒影。墙、弓、案几笔淡线，大量留白。

captions.zh: 后来县令带他重回席间，
captions.pinyin: hòu lái xiàn lìng dài tā chóng huí xí jiān
captions.local: Sau này, quan huyện đưa ông trở lại bàn tiệc hôm ấy,

captions.pinyin: tā cái kàn qīng
captions.local: ông mới nhìn rõ:

captions.pinyin: suǒ wèi dú shé
captions.local: con rắn độc kia,

captions.pinyin: zhǐ shì qiáng shàng cháng gōng de dào yǐng
captions.local: chỉ là bóng cây cung treo trên tường.

shots.content: A slender middle-aged Chinese man, hair tied up in a small dark topknot bun, short thin dark beard, FAIR LIGHT skin, wearing a plain DARK-BLUE crossed-collar ankle-length robe with wide sleeves and a dark cloth belt, stands straight and healthy again, one hand on his chest, smiling brightly with relief, a few warm small sparkles floating around him. Clean minimal scene, lots of empty white space.
shots.contentZh: 杜宣（同款束发短须深蓝长袍）重新站得挺拔健康，一手抚胸、笑容明亮释然，身边几点温暖小星光。干净极简，大量留白。

captions.pinyin: xīn bìng shùn jiān quán yù
captions.local: Bệnh trong lòng lập tức khỏi hẳn.

shots.content: The chubby little boy with short golden-brown hair in his green T-shirt and blue shorts sits on the floor hugging his knees, looking worried; above his head floats one big messy tangled scribble ball of thin pencil lines, like noisy imagined thoughts. Nothing else around, lots of empty white space.
shots.contentZh: 胖男孩（金棕短发、绿T恤蓝短裤）抱膝坐地、神情烦恼；头顶漂一大团乱糟糟的细铅笔线团（脑补的杂念）。周围无它物，大量留白。

captions.pinyin: wǒ men dà duō nèi hào
captions.local: Phần lớn nỗi tự giày vò của chúng ta,

captions.pinyin: cóng lái bú shì shì duō nán
captions.local: chưa bao giờ là vì việc quá khó,

captions.pinyin: shì bǎ nǎo bǔ de huàn xiàng
captions.local: mà là vì đem ảo ảnh tự tưởng tượng,

captions.pinyin: dàng chéng shāng hài zì jǐ de zhēn xiàng
captions.local: xem thành sự thật rồi tự làm đau mình.

shots.content: The chubby little girl with two small pigtails in her pink dress sits on the floor inside a large hand-drawn pencil circle that surrounds her, her own hand still holding a big pencil that has just drawn the circle around herself — trapped by a line she drew herself, looking a bit sad. Minimal, nothing else around, lots of empty white space.
shots.contentZh: 胖女孩（双马尾、粉裙）坐在一圈手绘大铅笔圆圈里，手里还握着刚画完这圈的大铅笔——被自己画的线困住，神情有点低落。极简，周围无它物，大量留白。

captions.pinyin: tòng kǔ bú zài wài jiè
captions.local: Nỗi khổ không nằm ở bên ngoài,

captions.pinyin: ér zài zì jǐ kùn zhù zì jǐ
captions.local: mà ở chỗ mình tự giam mình.

shots.content: One ancient Chinese lacquer EAR-CUP on the low wooden table: a WIDE SHALLOW OVAL cup, dark red-brown lacquer, with TWO small flat ear-shaped handles on its long sides, NOT a teacup, NO round loop handle, NO saucer. The cup is calm and clean under soft warm light, with NO shadow in the wine at all; on the wall behind, only the faintest hint of the long bow's outline. Peaceful, minimal, a few loose light pencil lines, lots of empty white space.
shots.contentZh: 同一只宽口浅漆耳杯放在矮木案上，柔和暖光下平静干净，酒面再无任何暗影；背后墙上只有极淡的长弓轮廓。安宁极简，几笔淡线，大量留白。

captions.pinyin: xiàn zài zhé mó nǐ de jiāo lǜ
captions.local: Nỗi lo đang giày vò bạn lúc này,

captions.pinyin: shì xiàn shí nán tí
captions.local: là khó khăn có thật,

captions.zh: 还是凭空想出来的心魔？
captions.pinyin: hái shi píng kōng xiǎng chū lái de xīn mó
captions.local: hay chỉ là tâm ma do bạn tự nghĩ ra?
